content.en:
Ye Tian didn't care about the affairs of the Divine Heaven Realm, and he couldn't take care of it.

The destruction of the Divine Heaven Realm is something that cannot be stopped, all the creatures who cannot achieve the Dao Ancestor are equivalent to no transcendence, even if they escape from the Divine Heaven Realm, their origin is still in the Divine Heaven Realm, and the Dao Ancestors who use special treasures to achieve the Dao Ancestor will also die one by one.

Only Dao Ancestors who rely on themselves to achieve harmony can get rid of the realm and survive outside the realm.

In other words, once the Divine Heaven Realm is destroyed, all the Dao Ancestors will be destroyed, and if they can't leave the Divine Heaven Realm, those Dao Ancestors will also die and fall.

And where would an ordinary Dao Ancestor dare to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, he wouldn't be able to live long at all.

Even the Domain Ancestor, if he couldn't enter a realm, he might die in the Dark Forbidden Realm one day.

"It's a pity!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was sorry for the creatures of a realm, but he couldn't save the creatures of this realm.

Of course, the Wargate has a way to extend the life limit of a realm, but the cost is relatively high, even higher than the cost of creating a realm.

Naturally, Zhanmen will not do it, unless it is stupid.

Ye Tian didn't care about the situation in the Divine Heaven Realm, but settled down in a certain world in the Divine Heaven Realm, paying attention to the situation in the Divine Heaven Realm, waiting for the day of great destruction.

As time passed, the Divine Heaven Realm began to be chaotic, and the number of forbidden creatures became more and more, and the Domain Ancestors couldn't stop it.

Moreover, these domain ancestors no longer cared about it, but planned to leave the Divine Heaven Realm and find life.

Even if he didn't know that the Divine Heaven Realm was about to be shattered before, he now knew that if he was still waiting to die, it would be over.

They also had to find it early, otherwise the Divine Heaven Realm would be completely shattered, and a large number of forbidden creatures would arrive, and they would not be able to escape.

Some Domain Ancestors directly rushed out of the Divine Heaven Realm and entered the Dark Forbidden Realm, randomly choosing a direction to find a place of vitality.

And there are still some domain ancestors who can't let go of everything now and their relatives, and choose to stay in the Divine Heaven Realm.

With the increasing number of forbidden creatures, a large number of worlds have been shattered.

And Ye Tian also began to work, collecting some of the world's origins, and killing some forbidden creatures by the way.

In the blink of an eye, another 20 million years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian killed a lot of forbidden creatures, and also collected a lot of world origins, these world origins are also a resource for the Devouring Clan, if they sneak into the Dark Destruction Domain in the future, these world origins can be exchanged for a lot of good things.

Therefore, taking advantage of this opportunity, it is natural to collect some.

this day.

A large number of forbidden creatures poured into the Divine Heaven Realm at the same time, there were many, many of them, and there were many powerful forbidden creatures comparable to the top domain ancestor level.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian knew that the Divine Heaven Realm was about to fall into a great ruin.

Bang!!!!!!

The Divine Heaven Realm began to shake, and areas began to crack, and one world after another shattered.

The endless power of destruction swept through the entire Divine Heaven Realm, and such a scene was simply devastating for the people of the Divine Heaven Realm.

Countless creatures died in an instant, falling and dying one by one.

And this is a feast for forbidden creatures.

They devour the origin of the Divine Heaven Realm, and some forbidden creatures can also absorb the power of destruction and increase their strength.

Then.

Ye Tian began to use the secret technique of condensing the Destruction Crystal, constantly absorbing the power of destruction around him.

Under Ye Tian's control, the top-level destruction crystals were condensed and included in the inner world by him one by one.

Since the secret technique Ye Tian cast was a secret technique for condensing top-level destruction crystals, and the speed was very fast, the power of destruction absorbed was many, many, and many, and the power of destruction in a large area of territory poured into Ye Tian, which naturally attracted the attention of many forbidden creatures.

Some forbidden creatures also like to absorb the power of destruction, and Ye Tian did this to rob them of the power of destruction.

Suddenly, a large group of forbidden creatures rushed towards Ye Tian, wanting to kill him.

"Trouble!"

Ye Tian was a little helpless.

At this moment, Ye Ye finally knew why the Kanshui Holy Son and the Dead Yu Holy Son brought so many domain ancestors, in fact, the strength of those domain ancestors was average, and they couldn't deal with a top-level domain ancestor level Holy Son when they joined forces, which was not much help for those six great holy sons.

But they still brought a lot of domain ancestors, I'm afraid it was just to clean up these forbidden creatures.

Otherwise, when they condense the top-level destruction crystal, these forbidden creatures come to disturb, and there is no way to condense the top-level destruction crystal.

And the time for a realm to be destroyed is so long, once the time is missed, the power of destruction is completely integrated into the dark forbidden realm.

In that case, there will be no way to collect Destruction Crystals.

Ye Tian was not afraid of these forbidden creatures, but he didn't want them to disturb him.

"Five Elements Ban!"

Ye Tian performed this holy skill.

In the past 20 million years, he has barely cultivated this holy technique in the Divine Heaven Realm.

This holy technique can block the void, and naturally it can also block these forbidden creatures.

Thundered!!!!!

These forbidden creatures constantly attacked the Five Elements Blockade, and seemed to break the blockade, thus killing Ye Tian.

But after attacking for a while, they did not break through, and then they gave up.

After all, they don't want to waste their time, otherwise they will waste this opportunity.

But in fact, if they attacked for a while, Ye Tian would not be able to hold on, and the Five Elements Barrier would inevitably be broken.

Seeing that these forbidden creatures had retreated, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Subsequently, he began to condense the Destruction Crystal wholeheartedly.

A day passes!

Two days have passed!

Three days have passed!

......

In the blink of an eye, three full months have passed.

On this day, the Divine Heaven Realm was completely destroyed, there was no boundary in this area, only some world wreckage, ruins floating in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the corpses of some domain ancestors were also besieged to death by forbidden creatures, floating in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

And Ye Tian also stopped condensing the destruction crystal at this time, because the power of destruction was gone, and there was no way to condense it anymore.

At this time, Ye Tian's eyes were fixed on those forbidden creatures.

The forbidden creatures also looked at him, as if they wanted to kill him.

Ye Tian took out a blood spear, this was the top domain weapon of the Dead Universe Holy Son, and now it was also his weapon that copied his body.

"Hegemony Holy Technique, open!"

"Streamer Holy Technique, turn on!"

Ye Tian rushed into the forbidden creatures, showing great strength, even stronger than the original Dead Saint Son.

Puff puff!!!

One by one, the forbidden creatures died in Ye Tian's hands, and even those forbidden creatures at the top domain group level were not Ye Tian's opponents, and they were killed one by one.

There are no forbidden creatures at the Supreme Domain Ancestor level here, so none of the forbidden creatures can stop Ye Tian.

Soon after, the forbidden creatures were also frightened and fled one by one.

And Ye Tian put away the corpses of these forbidden creatures and immediately left here.
